case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ALEXANDER VOLKOV et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT VOLKOV, ALEKSANDR A ERROUEOUSLY SUED AS ALEXANDER  VOLKOV
ARBITRATOR SHIRLEY CECILE YAWITZ APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-10-2012 THROUGH NOV-08-2012.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-12-2013 - NOT HELD AND REMOVED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VOLKOV, ALEKSANDR A ERROUEOUSLY SUED AS ALEXANDER  VOLKOV HEARING SET FOR MAR-06-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALEKSANDR VOLKOV'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY STATED A CLAIM FOR AN OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: VOLKOV, ALEKSANDR A SUBSTITUTED FOR FOSTER, PHIL AS ATTORNEY FOR VOLKOV, ALEKSANDR A ERROUEOUSLY SUED AS ALEXANDER  VOLKOV
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-09-2012.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT ALEKSANDR VOLKOV'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER PRECLUDING EVIDENCE OF THE ITEMS ON THE ACCOUNT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR A FURTHER BILL OF PARTICULARS IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A MOTION (SUCH AS A MOTION IN LIMINE) BEFORE THE TRIAL JUDGE SEEKING TO PRECLUDE PLAINTIFF FROM INTRODUCING EVIDENCE. IT APPEARS THE REQUEST FOR A FURTHER BILL WAS MADE HERE PRIMARILY TO ENSURE THAT MOVANT IS NOT PRECLUDED FROM MAKING SUCH AN IN LIMINE MOTION. THE PRECLUSION DETERMINATION IS NOT RIPE NOW BECAUSE IT IS NOT CLEAR WHAT EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF WOULD SEEK TO INTRODUCE, WHETHER THAT MATERIAL WAS IN PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION AT THE TIME IT WAS SERVED WITH OR RESPONDED TO EARLIER REQUESTS FOR A BILL OF PARTICULARS, AND OTHER RELEVANT FACTS. WRITTEN ORDER TO BE PREPARED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077. ***AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ISSUES WRITTEN ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR FURTHER BILL OF PARTICULARS.***

Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Off Calendar

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Mtn For An Order Precluding Evidence
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: HELEN BRAGINSKY, ESQ., NELSON & KENNARD, 916.920.2295, FOR PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK.
ALEKSANDR VOLKOV, ESQ., 415.987.7000, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ALEKSANDR VOLKOV'S Motion for an order precluding evidence of the items on the account, or in the alternative, for a further bill of particulars is denied, without prejudice to a motion (such as a motion in limine) before the trial judge seeking to preclude plaintiff from introducing evidence. It appears the request for a further bill was made here primarily to ensure that movant is not precluded from making such an in limine motion. The preclusion determination is not ripe now because it is not clear what evidence plaintiff would seek to introduce, whether that material was in plaintiff's possession at the time it was served with or responded to earlier requests for a bill of particulars, and other relevant facts. WRITTEN ORDER TO BE PREPARED BY THE COURT. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

***AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ISSUES WRITTEN ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR FURTHER BILL OF PARTICULARS.***

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ALEKSANDR VOLKOV'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff has adequately stated a claim for an open book account. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
